title: Recipe for a Plant-based Diet
scenario: Write a recipe for a vegan stir-fry dish that serves 4-6 people. The recipe should include ingredient lists, cooking instructions, and nutritional information. The prompt should be 250-350 words and cater to a vegan audience.
constraints: Must include a list of ingredients and their quantities.
Must include nutritional information (calories, macronutrients, etc.).

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the cooking instructions clear and easy to follow?
Are the ingredients and their quantities accurate?
Are the nutritional facts accurate and relevant?
